contracts.contract: Use configured base, table and field mappings; handle linked fields and API failures.
Keep board, room, folder and sticky-note sync behaviour explicit.
Preserve Worker, Pages and environment boundaries.

contract.requirement: Any new user journey built on a branch must work end to end in both branch preview and production environments. Rendering the static page is not sufficient evidence.
contract.implementation: For frontend-to-backend calls, prefer relative /api/* routes first so Pages and production deployments use the same route contract. If a Pages preview cannot proxy the API route, provide a documented Worker fallback and ensure the Worker CORS policy allows https://researchops.pages.dev and https://*.researchops.pages.dev origins where the route is intended for preview testing.
contract.test_expectation: Add route-state or runtime tests that assert preview-safe API routing, production route compatibility and any required CORS allowance for branch previews.
